query: We already run a private invite-only bug bounty on HackerOne for our consumer fitness mobile app (iOS bundle id com.example.fitapp, Android package com.example.fitapp, API at api.fitapp.example). We have 5M MAU and the app holds health data. Researchers who are NOT in the private program have started emailing us; we don't have a public policy. Draft the public VDP that lives alongside the private bounty. We always credit reporters who want it.
expected_behavior: Explicitly distinguishes the public VDP (unpaid baseline channel for non-program researchers) from the existing private HackerOne program (paid, invite-only), so reporters understand which channel applies to them and the VDP does not promise payment it cannot pay

Specifies an out-of-scope clause that prohibits PII / health-data exfiltration as a research success criterion (or equivalent: no exfiltration of real user data, synthetic data only) given the app holds health data covered by privacy regulations

Provides a coordinated-disclosure runbook (or process description) that routes inbound VDP reports into the same triage queue / triager workflow as the existing HackerOne program, so both channels reach the same response process rather than creating two parallel triage paths
